docket_entries.description: JURY TRIAL ON JUL-11-2006 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT. JUDGE: D. BALLATI; CLERK: R. GOULDING: REPORTER: S. LEE, CSR # 4280

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUBEDAR, JAMEEL AS TO DEFENDANT CUBSTEAD, HAROLD DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT HEARING HEARING SET FOR JUN-02-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 218

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-03-2006 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON JUL-10-2006 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF HAVING SURGERY PER FRIEND WHO APPEARED WITH NOTE. THE COURT CONTINUED THIS MATTER FOR ONE WEEK. JUDGE ROBERT L DONDERO; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: CANDACE YOUNT CSR #2737 (206)
MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2006 ASSIGNED TO JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUL-11-2006 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 604, DAVID BALLATI. MATTER DID NOT SETTTLE AFTER BEING SENT TO JUDGE PRO TEM. (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUBEDAR, JAMEEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUBSTEAD, HAROLD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 162 TAYLOR STREET # 12; SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF WAIVES PAST DUE RENT,DAMAGES, FEES AND COSTS SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
